description_long: This is a flatbed utility trailer with a rectangular wooden deck supported by a sturdy black metal frame. It features two axles, each with a pair of black wheels, and prominent black fenders covering the wheels on both sides. The deck is constructed from dark brown wooden planks arranged lengthwise, providing a robust and stable surface for transporting goods or equipment. At the front, a triangular metal tongue extends outward, ending in a standard hitch for attachment to a towing vehicle. The trailer lacks any visible side rails, doors, or windows, emphasizing its open, utilitarian design for hauling large or irregularly shaped items. No branding, signage, or decorative elements are present, giving it a functional and unadorned appearance.
description: A flatbed utility trailer with a wooden plank deck, dual axles, black fenders, and a triangular metal hitch. The design is open and utilitarian, with no visible doors, windows, or signage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden deck, both axles with four wheels, and the black fenders.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the wooden deck, the triangular hitch, and the fenders on either side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the deck, wheels, and fenders from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the deck, the fenders, and the absence of any rear doors or ramps.
